title: Ramcharitmanas: The Lake of Rama's Deeds
description: Tulsidas retells the Ramayana in Hindi — the most widely read devotional text in northern India.
introduction: Tulsidas retells the Ramayana in Hindi — the most widely read devotional text in northern India.

translation.text: In the beginning, I bow to Lord Ganesha, the remover of obstacles, and to the guru, the dispeller of darkness.
